summary: The diff implements a USA color scheme (red #B22234, navy blue #3C3B6E, white #FFFFFF) by updating CSS custom properties in index.css and Tailwind config tokens in tailwind.config.js. The core color palette changes are present. However, constrained files (useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, and main.tsx) were modified despite the build request explicitly prohibiting changes to them. Additionally, the diff does not show updates to individual UI component files beyond the CSS variable/Tailwind token level.

missing_requirements.requirement: Buttons, headers, cards, and interactive elements all reflect the new palette consistently — verified at the component level
missing_requirements.reason: The diff only shows changes to index.css and tailwind.config.js for CSS variables/tokens. No individual component files (e.g., PostCard, MainContent, App.tsx) are shown as modified to directly apply or audit the new palette on buttons, headers, and cards.

hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly prohibits modifying this file, yet it appears as a modified file in the diff.
